name: Guyan 2v2 — 9-hole round (front only). A front/back schedule where every hole is 1-9, so the FRONT point value applies throughout (FR3/R5).
_contract: Same model as guyan-2v2-base-flat.json. The round has only front-nine holes (holeNumber <= 9); with a front/back schedule, all use frontCents (500). Proves a 9-hole round prices every hole off the front segment. Money integer cents.
_handCalc:
All holes 1-9 => FRONT pv=500 (half 250).

H1 (par4): 3/5/4/4. low A3<B4 => A. skin 3<=4 => A. TT 8=8 tie => 0. net-skins A best3=birdie(1), B4=0 => A+1. netPointsA=+3. cross += +750.
H5 (par3): 2/4/3/3. low A2<B3 => A. skin 2<=3 => A. TT 6=6 tie => 0. net-skins A best net2 on par3=birdie(1), B3=0 => A+1. netPointsA=+3. cross += +750.
H9 (par4): 4/4/3/5. low A4>B3 => B. skin 3<=4 => B. TT 8=8 tie => 0. net-skins A4=0, B best3=birdie(1) => B+1. netPointsA=-3. cross += -750.

cross per pair = 750+750-750 = +750. 4 edges b->a 750. per-player a=+1500, b=-1500. total 3000. All priced at front pv (500).
